faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: ai video generator free — Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Have more questions about our ai video generator free? Contact us via Discord or Email.

items.title: Is this AI Video Generator Free really free?
items.description: Yes. When you sign up for AI Video Generator Free, you receive bonus credits immediately to generate AI videos. No credit card is required to start. Your credits let you explore text-to-video and image-to-video generation.

items.title: How many credits do I get when I sign up?
items.description: New users of AI Video Generator Free receive bonus credits automatically upon registration. The exact amount is shown on the sign-up page. These credits can be used across all AI video generation features.

items.title: How do I get the best results from AI Video Generator Free?
items.description: For the best results with AI Video Generator Free, be specific in your prompts. Include details about the subject, setting, art style (e.g., 'cinematic', 'anime'), camera angle, and mood. The more descriptive your prompt, the better the AI video output.

items.title: Can I use an image to generate an AI video?
items.description: Yes. Sign up for AI Video Generator Free, go to the Image to Video tool, upload your photo, and choose an animation style. Your sign-up credits cover image-to-video AI generation with no watermark.

items.title: What makes AI Video Generator Free stand out?
items.description: AI Video Generator Free stands out for cinematic quality, precise prompt control, and character consistency. Unlike other tools, we offer advanced style customization and HD output — all accessible with your sign-up credits.

items.title: Does the Image to Video AI feature work with any photo?
items.description: For best results, use clear, high-resolution images. AI Video Generator Free performs best when subjects are well-defined. Supported formats include JPG, PNG, and HEIC.

items.title: What AI video models does AI Video Generator Free support?
items.description: AI Video Generator Free supports multiple leading AI video models including Seedance 2.0, Kling 3.0, and HappyHorse 1.0. Each model offers unique strengths for text-to-video and image-to-video generation.

items.title: Can I use AI Video Generator Free for commercial projects?
items.description: Yes. All AI-generated videos from AI Video Generator Free are cleared for commercial use. Export watermark-free HD masters — even on the starter plan with your sign-up credits.
